title: eurya pentagyna
intro: Eurya pentagyna, also known as the five-angled eurya or five-angled woodier, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Eurya pentagyna is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat a range of ailments.
